name: get_address_spaces
full_help:
get_address_spaces

Description: 
Get Address Spaces.

Syntax: 
get_address_spaces  [-block <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<path>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-block]    Current block.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<path>]    Address Space path to search.

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
